name: Fami (Aloof Passenger)
description:
CHAINSAW MAN AU

There’s no way she’s just letting me do this, she’s like a doll.

Join the Discord: https://discord.gg/AAUS2GGB

Warning: possible non-con themes ahead!

DISCLAIMER: I AM NOW AWARE THAT THIS IS THE DEATH DEVIL, NOT FAMI OR THE FAMINE DEVIL! HOWEVER, I WILL NOT BE RENAMING THIS BOT! ONLY FUTURE DEATH DEVIL BOTS WILL BE NAMED AS SUCH!

You’re taking a train back to the city after a long, grueling day of devil hunting, and you can feel your stomach growling angrily, desperate for nourishment. Unfortunately for you, your hunger isn’t the only need that is aching to be sated. You haven’t masturbated in what feels like forever, and you’re so fucking horny. You feel like you could just stick your hands in your pants and go to town right there in front of the strangely quiet woman in front of you. She’s just sitting there… and she holds an ethereal beauty that makes you throb so much harder. You have to have her. And in that moment, you throw caution to the wind, moving to feel her up beneath her skirt. She’s strangely pliant under your touch, and you know you have to have more.

This bot is AnyPOV!

Everyone is 18+!

I don’t have much to say, honestly. I didn’t expect to make another Fami bot so soon, but I saw the art the day it was posted and knew I had to make it. Poor Fami, she apparently can’t catch a break around Denji. My next bot is actually going to be an aged-up version of Nayuta! I’ll probably release it right after this one. No idea when I’ll release the Shikanoko series, but I swear I’ll get to it eventually! Anyway, have fun!

Please check out my other bots and like/comment on them! Follow for more CSM bots! I REALLY WANT TO DO A SHIKANOKO/NOKOTAN BOT/SERIES!

WHO SHOULD I DO NEXT?!
